title: Figure 1 in A little learning is a dangerous thing - on the usefulness of barcode data for genus-level taxonomy
author: Breitling, Rainer
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 1. Summary of the problems affecting molecular taxonomy at different levels of resolution. At the genus level, barcode-based phylogenetic inferences are least likely to be affected by problems that are seriously limiting work at the lower and higher levels of resolution.
steps_raw: Figure 1. Summary of the problems affecting molecular taxonomy at different levels of resolution. At the genus level, barcode-based phylogenetic inferences are least likely to be affected by problems that are seriously limiting work at the lower and higher levels of resolution.
